title: metastelma glabrius
intro: Metastelma glabrius is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family, Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Metastelma glabrius include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections. Herbal preparations of Metastelma glabrius, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
